title: Choro Q Dougram
main_page_extract:
Ryōsuke Takahashi (高橋 良輔, Takahashi Ryōsuke; born January 11, 1943) is a Japanese anime director, screenwriter, and producer. He has worked for Sunrise on many anime shows in the real robot genre, including Armored Trooper VOTOMS, Fang of the Sun Dougram, Panzer World Galient, and  Blue Comet SPT Layzner.
